channel.title: My-First-Article.mds on Amin Physics
channel.description: Recent content in My-First-Article.mds on Amin Physics

item.title: Why I Love Physics
item.description:
Physics is not just a subject for me. It is a way of seeing reality.

I love physics because it teaches me:

  • How the universe works
  • How logic defeats illusion
  • How curiosity never dies

Curiosity and Silence

Most answers in physics come from silence, patience, and deep observation — not noise.

This is why physics feels like meditation to me.
